tasks.label: CogOS: Ruff check
tasks.command: uv run ruff check --config ruff.cognitive-os.toml src/cognitive_os tests/cognitive_os tests/contract scripts

tasks.label: CogOS: Ruff format check
tasks.command: uv run ruff format --check --config ruff.cognitive-os.toml src/cognitive_os tests/cognitive_os tests/contract scripts
